executives.name: Cor Coe
executives.background: Mr. Coe is a Professional Geologist (P.Geo.) and a Mining Technologist with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He has been involved in all aspects of mineral exploration and development, from project generation to mine production. He has served as a director and officer of several public mining companies.

executives.name: Donald Penner
executives.background: Mr. Penner is a Professional Geologist with over 40 years of experience in the mineral exploration industry. He has worked for both major and junior mining companies and has been involved in the discovery and development of several mineral deposits. He has served as a director and officer of several public mining companies.

executives.name: Steve Gower
executives.background: Mr. Gower has over 30 years of experience in the financial services and mining industries. He has served as a director and officer of several public mining companies and has been involved in the financing and development of numerous mineral projects.

board_of_directors.name: Cor Coe
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Coe is a Professional Geologist (P.Geo.) and a Mining Technologist with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He has been involved in all aspects of mineral exploration and development, from project generation to mine production. He has served as a director and officer of several public mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Donald Penner
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Penner is a Professional Geologist with over 40 years of experience in the mineral exploration industry. He has worked for both major and junior mining companies and has been involved in the discovery and development of several mineral deposits. He has served as a director and officer of several public mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Steve Gower
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gower has over 30 years of experience in the financial services and mining industries. He has served as a director and officer of several public mining companies and has been involved in the financing and development of numerous mineral projects.

board_of_directors.name: Scott Price
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Price has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, with a focus on project management and development. He has served as a director and officer of several public mining companies and has been involved in the development of several mineral projects in North America.

board_of_directors.name: Pete Dasler
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Dasler is a Professional Geologist with over 40 years of experience in the mineral exploration and mining industry. He has served as a director and officer of several public mining companies and was the President and CEO of Canex Metals Inc.
